name: DANEVILLE PIZZA PUB AND GRILL LLC

violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Door of walk in cooler is not able to seal when closed.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Ice machine should be cleaned frequently to prevent build up.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Specifically, floor in prep area and floor mats in the walk in cooler not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
